title: StarTrain
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''StarTrains''' were vessels used to transport cargo during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==History==
One Imperial StarTrain container with 300 factory-sealed [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttles]] was found abandoned shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==Sources==
